		<style id="wp-custom-css">
			td.data-results {
		text-align:center
}

.sp-post-content hr {
    margin: 20px;
}

.elementor .elementor-widget:not(.elementor-widget-text-editor) figure {
    margin: auto;
    margin-top: 40px;
}


.sp_event_spec{
	text-align:center;
	font-style:italic;
}

.sp-event-date{
	font-size:1.4em;
}

.sp-event-blocks .team-logo {
    margin: 10px;
    width: 20%;
    height: 100px;
	  max-width:none;
    text-align: center;
}


td.data-w, td.data-l,td.data-ot,td.data-so, td.data-gf,td.data-ga,td.data-gp, td.data-tie, td.data-first, td.data-second, td.data-third, td.data-goals {
	text-align:center;
	font-size:1.2em;
	font-weight:700;
}


.tag-links a, .tag-links a:visited, .taglinks a:active { 
background:#00539f;
border:1px solid #ccc;
border-radius:7px;
text-decoration:none;
padding:7px;
margin:7px;
text-transform:uppercase;
color:#bdbdbd;
}
 
.tag-links a:hover { 
background:#ffd200;
color:#00539f;
}

blockquote {
  position: relative;
  font-family: 'Sanchez', serif;
  font-size: 1.4em;
  line-height: 1.6em;
	display: inline-block;
}

blockquote footer {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: .8em;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: darken($white, 15%);
    float: right;	
}    

blockquote footer:before {
      content: '\2015';  
}

blockquote footer:after {
      content: '\201D';
      position: absolute;
      top: .1em;
      right: 02;
      font-size: 6em;
      font-style: italic;
      color: darken($white, 7%);
      z-index: -1;
   }

/* Game Schedule Styles */
.game-block {
  padding:  20px;
	background: #f9f9f9;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
	border-radius:5px;
	margin-bottom:20px;
	width:85%;
}
.game-block strong {
  font-size: 24px;
  color: #333;
}
.game-block em {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  color: #666;
}

/* Game Block with Logos */
.game-block-logos {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  background: #f9f9f9;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

.left-team, .right-team {
  text-align: center;
}

.logo-img {
  width: 80px;
  height: 80px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto 8px auto;
}

.squad-name {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #333;
}

.game-center {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0 20px;
}

.game-time {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #0066cc;
}

.vs {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #666;
  margin: 5px 0;
}

.game-venue {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.watch-link {
  background: #00539f;
  color: white !important;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .game-block-logos {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 15px;
  }
  .game-center {
    order: -1;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .logo-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .game-block {
    padding: 15px 10px;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    border-radius: 5px;
		width:100%;
  }
	.game-block strong{display: block;}
}
.section-heading {
  font-size: 42px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: white;
  background: #0066cc;
  text-align: center;
  border: 3px solid #0066cc;
  padding: 15px 30px;
  margin: 30px auto;
  max-width: fit-content;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
}

/* Ticket Section Styles */
.ticket-container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  padding: 20px 0;
}

.ticket-option {
  background: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 20px;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.ticket-option:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.ticket-option.featured {
  border-color: #0066cc;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #f0f8ff, #fff);
}

.badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: #ff6b35;
  color: white;
  padding: 4px 15px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: bold;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.ticket-type {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #333;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.ticket-price {
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.price-main {
  display: block;
  font-size: 36px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #0066cc;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.price-child {
  display: block;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
}

.ticket-savings {
  background: #fffbf0;
  color: #ff6b35;
  padding: 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.buy-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #0066cc;
  color: white !important;
  padding: 12px 30px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-weight: bold;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.buy-btn:hover {
  background: #0052a3;
  transform: scale(1.05);
}

.buy-note {
  color: #666;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 14px;
}

/* Simple Single Ticket Layout */
.ticket-container-simple {
  max-width: 400px;
  margin: 20px auto;
}

.ticket-option-single {
  background: #fff;
  border: 3px solid #0066cc;
  border-radius: 15px;
  padding: 30px;
  text-align: center;
}

.ticket-note {
  color: #666;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 15px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.buy-btn-coming {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #666;
  color: white !important;
  padding: 12px 30px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-weight: bold;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* Mobile Responsive */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .ticket-container {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    padding: 10px;
  }
  
  .ticket-option {
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  
  .ticket-option.featured {
    order: -1; /* Moves featured to top on mobile */
  }
  
  .price-main {
    font-size: 32px;
  }
}



dl.sp-player-details dt {
	color: #00539f;	
	font-size: 0.875rem;
	font-style: normal;
	font-weight: 700;
	margin-right: 0.375rem;
	text-decoration: none;
	text-transform: none;
    float: left;
    clear: left;}

dl.sp-player-details dt::after {
    content: ": ";
}

dl.sp-player-details dd {
	font-size: 14px;
	line-height: 21px;
	text-align: left;
	padding: 0 0 0.5em 0;
	width:800px;
}

.sp-post-content a {
	text-decoration:underline
}

.btn-dhn {
  background-color: #0057B3;
  border: none;
  color: #FFCC00;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  font-size: 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
	font-weight: bold;
}

.title-bar{
    border:4px;
    border-color: #ffd200;
    border-bottom-style: solid;
    color:#00539f;
    font-weight: bold;
    width:80%;
    margin-top: 44px;
    font-size:1.75rem;
}



/*  background on mouse-over */
.btn-dhn:hover {
  background-color: RoyalBlue;
}

.sp-event-calendar tbody td a,.sp-event-calendar tbody td a:hover{background: none;}.sp-data-table th,.sp-calendar th,.sp-data-table tfoot,.sp-calendar tfoot,.sp-button,.sp-heading{background:#ffd200 !important}.sp-calendar tbody a{color:#ffd200 !important}.sp-data-table tbody,.sp-calendar tbody{background: #e9f0f5 !important}.sp-data-table tbody,.sp-calendar tbody{color: #000000 !important}.sp-data-table th,.sp-data-table th a,.sp-data-table tfoot,.sp-data-table tfoot a,.sp-calendar th,.sp-calendar th a,.sp-calendar tfoot,.sp-calendar tfoot a,.sp-button,.sp-heading{color: #00539f !important}.sp-data-table tbody a,.sp-data-table tbody a:hover,.sp-calendar tbody a:focus{color: #00539f !important}.sp-highlight,.sp-calendar td#today{background: #ffffff !important}

.ud-schedule-main{
	width:100%;
}

.ud-schedule-outer{
	width:100%;
	display:flex;
	margin-bottom:15px;
	min-height: 100px;
	flex-direction: column;
	justify-content: flex-start;
	align-items: flex-start;
	border-style: solid;
  border-width: 1px;
  border-radius: 10px;
	border-color:#bdbdbd;
	border-left-width:10px;
	border-left-color:#00539f;
  box-shadow: 0px 1px 1px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
	padding:10px;
	gap:15px;
}

.ud-schedule-event{
	background-color:#fdd000;
	justify-content:center;
	margin:0px;
	text-transform:uppercase;
	font-size:0.75em;
	font-weight:900;
	line-height: 24px;
  letter-spacing: 8px;
	border-radius:100px;
}

.ud-schedule-teams {
	margin-right:27px;
}

.ud-schedule-logo{
	width:65px;
}

.ud-schedule-outer a{
	text-decoration:none;
}

.ud-schedule-result-date, .ud-schedule-teams, .ud-schedule-location  {
	display:flex;
	flex-direction:column;
	justify-content:center;
	height:100px;
}

.ud-schedule-location  {
	width:50%;
}	

.ud-schedule-eventspecs{
	display:flex;
	font-size:	0.75em;
	align-items:center;
}

.ud-schedule-eventspecs a button{
	line-height: 1.5;
	border:solid;
	border-radius:10px;
	background:#00539f;
	border:0px solid;
	font-size: 0.75em;
	font-weight:900;
text-decoration:none;
text-transform:uppercase;
color:#fff;
	justify-content:center;
	align-content:center;
	padding: 6px 16px;
	margin:2px;
}

@media (max-width: 1024px){

	.ud-schedule{
		flex-direction:column;
	}
	
	.ud-schedule-location, ud.schedule-result-date{
		width:100%;
		height:30px;
		margin-top:10px;
	}
	
	
	.ud-schedule-teams{
		flex-wrap:wrap;
		align-content:center;	
		margin-right:0;

		margin-top:-0px;
	}
	.ud-schedule-event{
		letter-spacing:2px;
	}

	
	
}
		</style>

<script type="speculationrules">
{"prefetch":[{"source":"document","where":{"and":[{"href_matches":"/*"},{"not":{"href_matches":["/wp-*.php","/wp-admin/*","/wp-content/uploads/*","/wp-content/*","/wp-content/plugins/*","/wp-content/themes/delaware-hockey/*","/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor/*","/*\\?(.+)"]}},{"not":{"selector_matches":"a[rel~=\"nofollow\"]"}},{"not":{"selector_matches":".no-prefetch, .no-prefetch a"}}]},"eagerness":"conservative"}]}

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

<script id="elementor-frontend-js-after">
window.scope_array = [];
								window.backend = 0;
								jQuery.cachedScript = function( url, options ) {
									// Allow user to set any option except for dataType, cache, and url.
									options = jQuery.extend( options || {}, {
										dataType: "script",
										cache: true,
										url: url
									});
									// Return the jqXHR object so we can chain callbacks.
									return jQuery.ajax( options );
								};
							    jQuery( window ).on( "elementor/frontend/init", function() {
									elementorFrontend.hooks.addAction( "frontend/element_ready/global", function( $scope, $ ){
										if ( "undefined" == typeof $scope ) {
												return;
										}
										if ( $scope.hasClass( "uael-particle-yes" ) ) {
											window.scope_array.push( $scope );
											$scope.find(".uael-particle-wrapper").addClass("js-is-enabled");
										}else{
											return;
										}
										if(elementorFrontend.isEditMode() && $scope.find(".uael-particle-wrapper").hasClass("js-is-enabled") && window.backend == 0 ){
											var uael_url = uael_particles_script.uael_particles_url;

											jQuery.cachedScript( uael_url );
											window.backend = 1;
										}else if(elementorFrontend.isEditMode()){
											var uael_url = uael_particles_script.uael_particles_url;
											jQuery.cachedScript( uael_url ).done(function(){
												var flag = true;
											});
										}
									});
								});

								// Added both `document` and `window` event listeners to address issues where some users faced problems with the `document` event not triggering as expected.
								// Define cachedScript globally to avoid redefining it.

								jQuery.cachedScript = function(url, options) {
									options = jQuery.extend(options || {}, {
										dataType: "script",
										cache: true,
										url: url
									});
									return jQuery.ajax(options); // Return the jqXHR object so we can chain callbacks
								};

								let uael_particle_loaded = false; //flag to prevent multiple script loads.

								jQuery( document ).on( "ready elementor/popup/show", () => {
										loadParticleScript();
								});

								jQuery( window ).one( "elementor/frontend/init", () => {
								 	if (!uael_particle_loaded) {
										loadParticleScript();
									}
								});
								
								function loadParticleScript(){
								 	// Use jQuery to check for the presence of the element
									if (jQuery(".uael-particle-yes").length < 1) {
										return;
									}
									
									uael_particle_loaded = true;
									var uael_url = uael_particles_script.uael_particles_url;
									// Call the cachedScript function
									jQuery.cachedScript(uael_url);
								}
//# sourceURL=elementor-frontend-js-after
</script>
